stdout:
usage: administratum_agent_runner.py [-h] [--plain-json] [--no-color]
                                     [--color] [--verbose] [--compact]
                                     [--ascii] [--rich] [--no-rich]
                                     {status,check,where,identity,pack,help,inventory,classify-path,provenance-index,useful-candidates,detect-dirty-runtime,route-to-organs,merge-summary,scan-imperium-context,classify-local-context,collect-reality-snapshot,collect-continuity-pack,build-agent-handoff-context,verify-pack-against-reality,metrics-summary,explain-decision,show-kpd,cu-summary,doctor-rich,doctor-oss,build-dossier,verify-dossier,schema-regression,validate-freelance-envelope,build-freelance-handoff,check-all,recent,open-runs,shell,optional-oss-proposal,transfer-verify-pack,transfer-send-vm2,transfer-push-vm2,transfer-fetch-vm2,transfer-status}
                                     ...

Administratum-Agent V1 hardened local CLI (IMPERIUM_NEW_GENERATION sandbox).

positional arguments:
  {status,check,where,identity,pack,help,inventory,classify-path,provenance-index,useful-candidates,detect-dirty-runtime,route-to-organs,merge-summary,scan-imperium-context,classify-local-context,collect-reality-snapshot,collect-continuity-pack,build-agent-handoff-context,verify-pack-against-reality,metrics-summary,explain-decision,show-kpd,cu-summary,doctor-rich,doctor-oss,build-dossier,verify-dossier,schema-regression,validate-freelance-envelope,build-freelance-handoff,check-all,recent,open-runs,shell,optional-oss-proposal,transfer-verify-pack,transfer-send-vm2,transfer-push-vm2,transfer-fetch-vm2,transfer-status}
    status              Show agent status snapshot.
    check               Run Base Half required check/report refresh.
    where               Show important Administratum base paths.
    identity            Show Administratum identity/profile baseline.
    pack                Build Base Half continuity pack under local context.
    help                Show Base Half compact command contract.
    inventory           Build repository inventory report.
    classify-path       Classify one path and explain route.
    provenance-index    Build provenance index report.
    useful-candidates   Build useful-candidates report.
    detect-dirty-runtime
                        Detect runtime pollution outside admitted RUNS layer.
    route-to-organs     Route findings to organ agents.
    merge-summary       Build merge-preparation summary.
    scan-imperium-context
                        Scan LOCAL/PRIVATE context roots in metadata-only
                        mode.
    classify-local-context
                        Classify local/private context and detect export risk.
    collect-reality-snapshot
                        Collect current git/runtime reality snapshot.
    collect-continuity-pack
                        Collect continuity pack for handoff.
    build-agent-handoff-context
                        Build handoff context for downstream agents.
    verify-pack-against-reality
                        Verify continuity pack against current reality.
    metrics-summary     Aggregate metrics from a target run.
    explain-decision    Explain path classification and route decision.
    show-kpd            Generate KPD and thinking-quality score from run
                        evidence.
    cu-summary          Build Control Units (CU) index and summary.
    doctor-rich         Diagnose Rich/color renderer availability and fallback
                        reasons.
    doctor-oss          Detect OSS tool availability and PDF backend status.
    build-dossier       Build a dossier ZIP from canonical report and receipt
                        inputs.
    verify-dossier      Verify dossier ZIP required files and hash manifest.
    schema-regression   Validate core JSON/schema/dossier/freelance contracts.
    validate-freelance-envelope
                        Validate an Administratum freelance task envelope.
    build-freelance-handoff
                        Build Administratum's scoped freelance handoff
                        package.
    check-all           Run full Administratum hardening check suite.
    recent              Show recent run summaries.
    open-runs           Show runtime RUNS root path.
    shell               Interactive local Administratum shell.
    optional-oss-proposal
                        Write optional OSS enhancement proposal (advisory
                        only).
    transfer-verify-pack
                        Verify a Logos prompt pack ZIP for VM2 transfer.
    transfer-send-vm2   Stamp and place a prompt pack in the VM2 transfer
                        intake.
    transfer-push-vm2   Push a prompt pack to VM2 and require remote
                        SHA256/size proof.
    transfer-fetch-vm2  Fetch and verify a VM2 response ZIP by exact filename.
    transfer-status     Show Administratum transfer runtime status.

options:
  -h, --help            show this help message and exit
  --plain-json          Machine-readable JSON output (authoritative mode).
  --no-color            Disable ANSI colors.
  --color               Enable ANSI colors (when terminal supports).
  --verbose             Verbose output with full details blocks.
  --compact             Compact renderer mode.
  --ascii               Force ASCII-safe panel rendering.
  --rich                Enable optional Rich renderer when available.
  --no-rich             Force stdlib renderer even if Rich is available.
